set_bleConfig.Enable BLE: Enables BLE scanning in the reader configuration.
set_bleConfig.Set scan interval: Enables BLE scanning and sets the BLE scan interval.
set_bleConfig.Apply RSSI filter: Enables BLE scanning and filters advertisements by minimum RSSI.
set_bleConfig.Configure protocol filters: Enables BLE scanning with iBeacon, AltBeacon, Eddystone, generic BLE, RSSI, and service UUID filters.
set_bleConfig.Disable BLE: Disables BLE scanning in the reader configuration.

start.Start BLE and RFID: Starts BLE scanning and RFID inventory together.

stop.Stop BLE and RFID: Stops BLE scanning and RFID inventory together.
